title: RGB Redstone Dust
body: This is a texture pack for signal strength based RGB Redstone dust, a panel in front of dot redstone dust that changes color depending on the signal strenth. I am not the first person to make this, but I couldn't find the OG _anywhere,_ so I made it myself. Not only can you make redstone RGB screens, but you can also do some changes for any custom panels! All you have to do is rename some thing, and retexture some things. Have fun!
